jcr:content.jcr:description: Form Text and Text Area — test fixtures with all states for GAAM-504 automation.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Form Text & Text Area — Test Fixtures

text_header.text:
Form Text & Text Area — Test Fixtures

Copy of style guide page with additional Filled and Required+Helper states for test automation (GAAM-504).

form_text_req_helper.helpMessage: We will never share your email with third parties
form_text_req_helper.name: req-helper-text
form_text_req_helper.title: Required + Helper

form_text_slate_req_helper.helpMessage: US numbers only, including area code
form_text_slate_req_helper.name: slate-req-helper
form_text_slate_req_helper.title: Required + Helper

form_text_granite_req_helper.helpMessage: We will never share your email
form_text_granite_req_helper.name: granite-req-helper
form_text_granite_req_helper.title: Required + Helper

form_text_azul_req_helper.helpMessage: We will never share your email
form_text_azul_req_helper.name: azul-req-helper
form_text_azul_req_helper.title: Required + Helper

form_textarea_filled.helpMessage: Filled state — counter shows current length
form_textarea_filled.name: filled-textarea
form_textarea_filled.title: Filled with Counter
form_textarea_filled.value: This is pre-filled text area content that demonstrates the filled state styling with an active character counter.

form_textarea_slate_filled.name: slate-filled-textarea
form_textarea_slate_filled.title: Filled with Counter
form_textarea_slate_filled.value: Pre-filled content for slate background testing.

form_textarea_granite_filled.name: granite-filled-textarea
form_textarea_granite_filled.title: Filled with Counter
form_textarea_granite_filled.value: Pre-filled content for granite dark mode testing.

form_textarea_azul_filled.name: azul-filled-textarea
form_textarea_azul_filled.title: Filled with Counter
form_textarea_azul_filled.value: Pre-filled content for azul dark mode testing.
